title: equisetum sylvaticum
intro: Equisetum sylvaticum, also known as field horsetail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Equisetaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including diuretic and antiseptic qualities, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Equisetum sylvaticum include its ability to support kidney function, lower blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Equisetum sylvaticum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
